name: Entrata Property Management API
what_it_does: Entrata REST API for multifamily property management platform. Enables AI agents to manage lease applications, resident data, rent collection, maintenance workflows, financial reporting, and resident communication across apartment communities. Entrata provides a unified platform spanning leasing, accounting, resident services, and analytics for multifamily operators.
use_cases: Managing leads and lease applications from leasing workflow automation agents
Processing rent payments and managing delinquency from financial agents
Handling maintenance requests and vendor dispatch from operations agents
Integrating resident data with marketing and communication platforms from integration agents
not_for: Commercial real estate without residential leasing workflows
best_when: A multifamily property management company using Entrata wants AI agents to automate leasing, resident services, maintenance, and financial operations across the portfolio.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Resident personal data including financial history and rental applications is highly sensitive. FCRA requirements apply to rental screening information.

auth.notes: Entrata uses HTTP Basic auth with username and password, or API key authentication. Credentials are property management company-scoped. Integration partner credentials available via Entrata partner program.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise property management pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-unit pricing for property management companies; enterprise contracts
pricing.notes: Utah-based private company. Multifamily-focused. Partner program for technology integrations. Pricing negotiated by portfolio size.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API credentials; partner SLAs available

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Resident personal data and financial history — FCRA applies to screening data
No public MCP server — REST API with Basic auth or API key
Partner program approval required for integration access
No granular scopes — API credentials provide broad access
Documentation quality varies by module — contact partner team for specifics
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Resident PII and financial history. SOC2, FCRA. US-only. Basic auth or API key. No granular scopes — broad access per credential.

security_score_components.security_notes: Resident PII and financial data. SOC2, FCRA. US-only. Basic auth — no granular scopes.
